LAW AND MOTION 301, SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT CERTAINTEED CORPORATION'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY ON GROUNDS OF FORUM NON-CONVENIENS IS GRANTED. THIS ACTION IS STAYED IN FAVOR OF A NEBRASKA FORUM, GIVEN THAT IT APPEARS NEBRASKA IS A SUITABLE FORUM AND THAT THE PRIVATE AND PUBLIC INTERESTS WEIGH HEAVILY IN FAVOR OF THAT FORUM. MS. PARKER WAS ASKING COURT IF SHE COULD COME BACK AFTER 90 DAYS TO REQUEST FOR A DISMISSAL IF NOTHING HAS BEEN FILED IN NEBRASKA. THE PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL HAS NO REAL OBJECTION TO SUCH REQUEST. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

MOTION To Dismiss Or Stay Plaintiffs Complaint For Forum Non Conveniens; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Defendant Cleaver Brooks Incs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Plaintiffs Complaint For Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Aug-07-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CLEAVER BROOKS'S (A DIVISION OF AQUA-CHEM, INC.) MOTION To Dismiss Or Stay Plaintiffs Complaint For Forum Non Conveniens IS OFF CALENDAR. THE CASE HAS BEEN STAYED PER COURT'S 07/29/08 RULING. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- ATTY. LAUREL SIMES OF LEVIN SIMES & KAISER, TEL. NO. 646-7160 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. SARA M. PARKER OF MCKENNA LONG & ALDRIDGE, TEL. NO. 267-4117 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT CERTAINTEED CORPORATION'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY ON GROUNDS OF FORUM NON-CONVENIENS IS GRANTED. THIS ACTION IS STAYED IN FAVOR OF A NEBRASKA FORUM, GIVEN THAT IT APPEARS NEBRASKA IS A SUITABLE FORUM AND THAT THE PRIVATE AND PUBLIC INTERESTS WEIGH HEAVILY IN FAVOR OF THAT FORUM. MS. PARKER WAS ASKING COURT IF SHE COULD COME BACK AFTER 90 DAYS TO REQUEST FOR A DISMISSAL IF NOTHING HAS BEEN FILED IN NEBRASKA. THE PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL HAS NO REAL OBJECTION TO SUCH REQUEST. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/PM
